ui_ux_improvements.title: Add spinner for long-running dispatcher operations
ui_ux_improvements.description: Display an animated spinner with status updates while dispatcher processes cards, showing current card ID and elapsed time
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Dispatcher can run for minutes without feedback, leaving users uncertain if it's working. Real-time progress indication improves perceived performance and confidence.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: Dispatcher runs silently with no output until completion. Users have no indication of progress during long-running card processing.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Add indicatif crate spinner that shows: '⠋ Processing card-123 (2m 34s elapsed)'. Update spinner state as cards transition through stages.
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Users can see that bop is actively working and track progress, reducing anxiety during long operations. Elapsed time helps estimate remaining work.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Color-code card states in list output
ui_ux_improvements.description: Apply consistent ANSI colors to state column in 'bop list' output matching the Gantt chart color scheme
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: List command shows states as plain text. Colors provide instant visual scanning and consistency with other commands (gantt uses colors).
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: List output shows state as plain text header like 'pending (3)'. No color differentiation between states.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Apply state_ansi() colors (already defined in gantt.rs): pending=blue, running=amber, done=green, failed=red, merged=violet. Colorize both state headers and individual card rows.
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Users can instantly identify card states at a glance without reading text. Improves scanning speed when reviewing many cards.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Add confirmation prompt for destructive commands
ui_ux_improvements.description: Require user confirmation before executing 'bop kill' and 'bop clean' without --force flag
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Kill terminates running work, clean deletes cards permanently. No confirmation risks accidental data loss. Industry standard for destructive CLI operations.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: Both 'bop kill' and 'bop clean' execute immediately with no confirmation. 'bop clean --dry-run' exists but requires explicit opt-in.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Add dialoguer crate for confirmation prompts. Show: 'Kill card-123? This will terminate the running agent and move to failed/. [y/N]'. Add --force/-f flag to skip prompt for automation.
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Prevents accidental data loss from typos or misunderstanding command effects. Gives users a moment to reconsider destructive operations.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Improve error messages with actionable suggestions
ui_ux_improvements.description: Enhance error messages with 'Try: <command>' suggestions for common failure cases
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Current errors like 'card not found' don't guide users on next steps. Adding suggestions reduces support burden and improves self-service.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: Errors use anyhow with context but lack actionable guidance. Example: 'card not found: xyz' with no suggestion to list cards or check spelling.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Add suggestions to common errors: 'card not found: xyz\n  Try: bop list --state all | grep xyz' or 'no open round for card-123\n  Try: bop poker open card-123'
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Users learn correct workflows through error messages. Reduces frustration and documentation lookups for common mistakes.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Add fuzzy-finding for card IDs
ui_ux_improvements.description: Implement 'did you mean?' suggestions when card ID not found, using fuzzy matching against existing cards
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Card IDs can be long (32+ chars). Typos are common. Fuzzy matching helps users quickly find the correct ID without re-listing.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: Card ID mismatches fail with 'card not found: <id>'. No suggestions or partial matches offered.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change:
Use strsim crate to find similar IDs (Levenshtein distance < 3) and suggest: 'card not found: card-abc
  Did you mean:
    • card-123
    • card-456'
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Users recover from typos instantly without re-running 'bop list'. Reduces friction in common workflows.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Enhance progress bars with inline percentages and colors
ui_ux_improvements.description: Upgrade progress bars in list output to use rich Unicode blocks with inline percentage and color gradients
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Current progress bars use basic ▓/░ blocks without percentage text. Users must count blocks to understand progress.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: Progress bar in list.rs line 80-92: uses 8-char bar with ▓/░ blocks, percentage displayed separately: '████░░░░ 45%'
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Use Unicode box-drawing for partial blocks (▏▎▍▌▋▊▉█) to show sub-percentage precision. Display inline: '█████▌ 68%' with gradient from yellow→green based on completion.
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: More accurate progress visualization at a glance. Color gradient provides instant understanding of how far along work is.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Add summary statistics to status output
ui_ux_improvements.description: Display aggregate stats (total cards, success rate, avg duration) at bottom of 'bop status' output
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Status shows individual cards but no overview metrics. Users need to mentally calculate totals and trends.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: Status (via list_cards) shows cards grouped by state with count per group. No totals, success rates, or trends displayed.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Add footer after list output: '\n═══ Summary ═══\nTotal: 47 cards | Active: 12 | Success rate: 85% (40/47) | Avg time: 3m 42s'
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Users get instant project health overview without manual counting or external tools. Helps track overall progress and quality.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Improve inspect output with visual hierarchy
ui_ux_improvements.description: Replace plain section headers in inspect output with styled headers, indentation, and better spacing
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Inspect dumps meta JSON, spec, and logs with minimal formatting. Sections blend together, hard to scan for specific info.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: Inspect output uses plain '=== meta (state) ===' headers with no indentation or visual separation. JSON blob appears flat.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Use box-drawing characters: '┌─ meta (running) ─┐' for headers, indent content by 2 spaces, add blank lines between sections. Use dim color for metadata fields.
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Users can quickly scan to find relevant section (meta, spec, logs) without reading everything. Improved readability for long outputs.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Add table formatting library for consistent alignment
ui_ux_improvements.description: Replace manual printf-style formatting with comfy-table crate for all tabular output
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Current tables use manual spacing (line 90 list.rs) which breaks with varying content widths. Glyphs, long IDs, and Unicode can misalign columns.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: Tables use printf-style formatting with fixed widths. List.rs line 89-92 truncates IDs to 32 chars but doesn't account for multi-byte glyphs.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Use comfy-table crate with auto-width calculation, proper Unicode width handling, and consistent borders. Define shared table style for bop aesthetic.
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Clean, properly aligned tables even with emoji, Unicode glyphs, and varying content lengths. Professional appearance.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Add elapsed time to logs --follow mode
ui_ux_improvements.description: Display elapsed time ticker in logs --follow mode showing how long the stream has been running
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Follow mode loops indefinitely with no indication of time spent watching. Users lose track of how long they've been waiting.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: Logs --follow (line 44-86) polls every 200ms and streams output, but shows no elapsed time or status indicator.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Add header line that updates in-place: '╭─ Watching card-123 logs (0m 34s) ─╮' using \r for in-place updates. Clear on exit.
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Users know how long they've been waiting, helping decide when to interrupt. Confirms that follow mode is active and working.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Enhance log colorization with structured log parsing
ui_ux_improvements.description: Parse JSON logs and colorize fields (timestamp, level, message) separately for better readability
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Current colorization (logs.rs line 91-118) uses keyword matching which misses structured logs. JSON logs appear as monotone text.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: colorize_log_line() searches for keywords like 'ERROR' or 'WARN'. JSON-formatted logs don't get colorized properly.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Detect JSON lines, parse them, and colorize components: dim timestamp, bright level, normal message. Fall back to keyword matching for plain text.
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Structured logs become readable with instant level identification. Particularly useful for claude/codex adapter outputs.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Add truncation indicators for long outputs
ui_ux_improvements.description: Show '... (25 more lines)' indicators when output is truncated, with hint to use --full flag
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Inspect truncates logs to 20 lines (line 52-56) with no indication that content was omitted. Users don't know if they're seeing everything.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: Inspect shows 'last 20 lines' in header but doesn't show how many lines were skipped or how to view full logs.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Add footer after truncated output: '... (142 more lines hidden)\n  View full: bop logs <id>' to guide users to complete output.
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Users understand output is truncated and know exactly how to view more. Reduces confusion about missing information.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Add success messages with next-step guidance
ui_ux_improvements.description: Enhance success messages to include suggested next commands and status information
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Success messages like 'Approved card-123' are terse. Users don't know what happens next or what command to run.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: Success messages are single-line println statements (e.g., cards.rs line 825: 'Approved {}'). No context or next steps.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Expand to: '✓ Approved card-123\n  Status: Ready for merge-gate\n  Next: bop merge-gate --once' with color-coded checkmark.
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Users understand workflow progression and learn the command sequence through usage. Reduces cognitive load.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Add interactive card selector for ambiguous IDs
ui_ux_improvements.description: When multiple cards match a partial ID, show interactive selector instead of error
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: Users often provide partial IDs expecting autocomplete. Currently fails with 'card not found' even if prefix matches multiple cards.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: find_card() searches all state dirs but requires exact ID match. No partial matching or selection UI.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change:
If ID matches multiple cards as prefix, use dialoguer Select to show: 'Multiple matches:
  > card-123-foo
    card-123-bar
Use ↑↓ arrows, Enter to select'
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Users can specify partial IDs and select interactively, much faster than copy-pasting full IDs. Reduces typing friction.

ui_ux_improvements.title: Add visual separator between state groups in list output
ui_ux_improvements.description: Insert colored separator lines between state groups (pending/running/done) for visual clarity
ui_ux_improvements.rationale: List output runs state groups together with only blank line separation (line 94). With many cards, states blend together.
ui_ux_improvements.current_state: State groups separated by single blank line (println!() at line 94). Headers blend into card rows with minimal distinction.
ui_ux_improvements.proposed_change: Add colored separator using box-drawing: '─────────────────' in dim color between groups. Make state headers bold.
ui_ux_improvements.user_benefit: Clear visual boundaries help users quickly locate cards in specific states. Improves scannability of long outputs.
